sentences.arabic: وَضَعَتِ الْأُمُّ قَاعِدَةً جَدِيدَةً فِي الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je uspostavila novo pravilo u kući.
sentences.translationEn: The mother established a new rule in the house.

sentences.arabic: لَا هَوَاتِفَ عَلَى الطَّاوِلَةِ أَثْنَاءَ الطَّعَامِ.
sentences.translation: Nema telefona za stolom za vrijeme jela.
sentences.translationEn: No phones at the table during meals.

sentences.translation: Djeca su se složila i odložila telefone.
sentences.translationEn: The children agreed and put their phones aside.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ وَقْتُ الطَّعَامِ وَقْتًا لِلْحَدِيثِ الْعَائِلِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Obrok je postao vrijeme za porodični razgovor.
sentences.translationEn: Meal time became a time for family conversation.
